svg.title: The Ring of Fire family tree
svg.desc: Five handgun companies trace back to Raven Arms, founded by George Jennings in 1970. Lorcin Engineering was founded by Jim Waldorf in 1989; Davis Industries by George's daughter Gail and her husband Jim Davis in 1982; Phoenix Arms succeeded Raven after a 1991 fire; Bryco Arms descends from Jennings Firearms, founded by Bruce Jennings in 1978, by way of Calwestco; and Sundance Industries by George's nephew in 1989. 1992 production totals Bryco 204883, Davis 187779, Lorcin 187761, Phoenix 67824, Sundance 17757.
